pr.title: Record: Two-Level Dirichlet Posterior Mixing with Per-Order OBCL -- 0.1156 BPB

output.summary: Two-level Dirichlet hierarchy with neural base, per-order OBCL-tuned concentrations across 2–15 grams, and phrase suffix smoothing.
techniques: Per-order OBCL concentration learning for each n-gram order
Phrase-level Dirichlet smoothing over suffix matches
Neural LM base prior feeding the hierarchical Dirichlet chain
